title: Back to School Grades | #shorts
full_text: Mom. >> Yeah. What's up? >> I got my report card back. >> You did? >> Yeah. >> Yeah. And what? Of course. I know. You got all A's. What? You always get all A's. >> I got four A's and one B+. >> You got one B+. Do you know what happened to the last kid who got a B+ that I know? >> What happened? >> He became a musician.
